newFeatures: Loading and restore screens now follow your selected theme, including dark, AMOLED, Material You, and custom accent colors.
Categories are unified across the app instead of being split into income and expense lists.
Notifications now focus on Android system notifications, including update availability alerts.
The side drawer uses a wider standard layout with more comfortable spacing around icons and labels.
bugFixes: Removed visible transaction status fields, values, chips, and filters from transaction flows.
Custom accent colors now apply more consistently with readable contrast for outlines, text, and selected states.
Loan EMI plans now show the total due with principal and interest clearly separated, and interest no longer creates an incorrect record balance effect.
Calendar month grids now use the correct week range and start on Sunday, then Monday through Saturday.
The bottom tab island is now solid instead of transparent.
Startup loading and recovery handling were tightened so wallet restore, session checks, and fallback retry states stay consistent.
notes: Built as Android 1.4.2 / 1040200 for arm64-v8a devices.
Expo SDK 56 package versions were aligned before release.
Validated with mobile typecheck, mobile lint, signed release build, physical phone install, non-debuggable release check, screenshots, and fatal-error log scans.
